@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "com" {
    class Observable <<A>> #lightblue
    
    namespace cmput201f10t09.vibes.models {
        class UserManager <<C>> 
        class User <<C>> 
        class Event <<C>> 
        class MoodEvent <<C>> 
        class EmotionalState <<C>> 
        
        Observer <|-- UserProfileObserver
        
        ' Relationships in models
        UserManager --> User : 0..* > *
        User o-- "*" Event
        Event <|-- MoodEvent
        MoodEvent -- "*" EmotionalState
        User ..> MapFragment
        User ..> FollowingListAdapter
        User ..> OwnMoodListAdatper
        User ..> FollowedMoodListAdapter
        User <-- ProfileFragment
        User <-- EditFrament
        User <-- MainActivity
        User <-- SplashActivity
        User <-- LoginActivity
        User <-- SignUpActivity
        User <-- ImageAdapter
        User <-- MoodDetailsDialogFragment
        User <-- MoodFilterDialog
        User <-- MoodListFilterListener
        UserPoint <- -User
        MoodEvent ->-MapFragment
        MoodEvent->-FollowingListAdapter
        MoodEvent-->OwnMoodListAdatper
        MoodEvent-->FollowedMoodListAdapter
        MoodEvent<--ProfileFragment
        MoodEvent<--EditFrament
        MoodEvent<--MainActivity
        MoodEvent<--SplashActivity
        MoodEvent<--LoginActivity
        MoodEvent<--SignUpActivity
        MoodEvent<--ImageAdapter
        MoodEvent<--MoodDetailsDialogFragment
        MoodEvent<--MoodFilterDialog
        MoodEvent<--MoodListFilterListener
        MoodEvent<- -UserProfileObserver
        MoodEvent<- -Observable
        MoodEvent<- -EmotionalState

        MoodEvent<- -Event
